title: Chapter 59: Luffy Defies Krieg’s Strength
main_description: The Baratie battle becomes a direct clash of values. Krieg relies on weapons and victory at any cost, while Gin, Sanji, Zeff, and Luffy struggle with loyalty, debt, and what real strength means.
key_events: Krieg escalates the fight with ruthless tactics.
Gin wavers between loyalty to Krieg and debt to Sanji.
Luffy challenges Krieg’s idea that victory alone defines strength.
